case_title: ADVANTAGE ASSETS, INC. VS. GREG DUNDIS

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER ADVANTAGE ASSETS, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT DUNDIS, GREG JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
